user.title: Set up HaWake Alarm
user.description:
Configure your HaWake Alarm device.

The **Topic Prefix** and **Device Name** must match what is configured in the HaWake iOS app under **Settings → MQTT Settings**.

For setup instructions, visit [{docs_url}]({docs_url}).

data_description.device_name: Must match the device name in the HaWake app's MQTT settings.
data_description.topic_prefix: MQTT topic prefix (default: hawake). Must match the app's MQTT topic prefix.

error.mqtt_not_configured: MQTT integration is not configured. Please set up MQTT first.

abort.already_configured: A device with this name is already configured.

init.title: HaWake Integration Info
